name: Yuria's Madness

sheet.name: Yuria's Madness
sheet.background_story:
Her rage has mostly subsided with the end of the war, and now she only knows the frustration of trying to please a companion who is hungers for more than the Turlo can provide.

Joined Natasha, her companion, to enter Final Battle at Church and survived.

Lingered around Wolf's party until the gates of Turlo opened. Stole the Molten Talisman and rushed into the Turlo alone.

Sister to Yuria's Fury. Keeper of Fury Concord Tokens: Obsidian Blade, Molten Talisman, and Raptor's Tooth.

Has taken on Natasha Sult as an apprentice.
